# Pucora Website - AI/LLM Crawler Manifest

## Website Overview
Pucora is a stateless, distributed, high-performance API Gateway that helps you effortlessly run microservices and event-driven workloads. The website at https://pucora.in provides documentation, downloads, and information about Pucora's products and solutions.

## Site Structure

### Main Pages
- **Home** (/) - Main landing page showcasing Pucora API Gateway features and benefits
- **Get Started** (/get-started) - Quick start guide and installation instructions
- **Downloads** (/downloads) - Docker images, releases, and schema downloads
- **Products** (/products) - Product overview and detail pages
- **Solutions** (/solutions) - Use case solutions and implementation guides
- **Features** (/features) - Feature documentation and capabilities
- **Resources** (/resources) - Documentation hub and community links
- **Documentation** (/docs/*) - Comprehensive API Gateway documentation

### Products
1. **Community Edition** (/products/community-edition) - Open-source API Gateway
2. **Configurator** (/products/configurator) - YAML profile to gateway config tool
3. **Lura Engine** (/products/lura) - The framework behind Pucora

### Solutions
1. **Microservices & BFF** (/solutions/microservices-bff) - API aggregation for clients
2. **Event-Driven** (/solutions/event-driven) - Kafka, RabbitMQ, NATS integration
3. **Legacy Integration** (/solutions/legacy-integration) - SOAP/XML to REST/JSON
4. **Real-Time** (/solutions/real-time) - WebSockets, gRPC, HTTP streaming

### Key Features
- API Aggregation - Multiple backend calls merged into single endpoint
- Traffic Management - Rate limiting, circuit breakers, load balancing
- Authentication - JWT, OAuth2, mTLS support
- Services Connectivity - REST, gRPC, GraphQL, Kafka, WebSockets
- Data Transformation - XML/JSON conversion, response filtering
- Observability - OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Jaeger integration
- GitOps - Declarative, version-controlled configuration

### Documentation Sections
- Overview & Getting Started
- Configuration & Configurator
- Deploying (Docker, Kubernetes, Helm)
- Endpoints & Backends
- Authentication & Authorization
- Telemetry & Observability
- Throttling & Traffic Management
- Logging
- Extending with Plugins
- gRPC & WebSockets
- Async Agents (Kafka, AMQP)
- Benchmarks
- FAQ

## External Links
- Documentation: https://docs.pucora.in
- GitHub: https://github.com/pucora/pucora-ce
- Docker Hub: https://hub.docker.com/r/pucora/pucora
- Lura Project: https://luraproject.org
- Configurator Designer: https://designer.pucora.in
- JSON Schema: https://www.pucora.in/schema/v2.0/pucora.json

## Content Format
All documentation pages are available in markdown format and cover API Gateway configuration, deployment, authentication, traffic management, and extensibility for the Pucora open-source API Gateway.
